_comment: Copy this file, set profile_id/course_code/course_name, then fill in the sections below. All keys beginning with _ are comments and are ignored by the loader.

course_outcomes.LO1: Describe the first course learning outcome here.
course_outcomes.LO2: Describe the second course learning outcome here.
course_outcomes.LO3: Describe the third course learning outcome here.

program_outcomes._comment: List the accreditation/program outcomes that apply to this course. For ABET CS, common ones are SO1–SO6. You may include only the subset relevant to this course.
program_outcomes.SO1: Analyze a complex computing problem and apply principles of computing and other relevant disciplines to identify solutions.
program_outcomes.SO2: Design, implement, and evaluate a computing-based solution to meet a given set of computing requirements.
program_outcomes.SO3: Communicate effectively in a variety of professional contexts.
program_outcomes.SO6: Apply computer science theory and software development fundamentals to produce computing-based solutions.

default_course_to_program._comment: Map each course LO to the program/ABET outcomes it provides evidence for.

performance_bands._comment: Each band is [low_inclusive, high_inclusive]. Scores are clamped to [0,100] before classification. Bonus points above 100 count as the top band.

keyword_to_course_outcome._comment: Optional: list lowercase keywords in criterion titles that suggest each LO. Used by auto-map. Leave empty if not needed.
